default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Attio CRM capabilities and address Bridget's questions about reporting, data management, and integrations.](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Attio offers flexible reporting with various chart types and the ability to report on any attribute](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Workflows can be used to enforce data quality and automate processes like lead routing and deal management](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [Attio's data model differs from Salesforce, using "people" instead of leads/contacts and treating all potential business as "deals" from the start](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Native integrations (e.g., Typeform) and workflows enable extensive automation of CRM processes](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

## Topics

### Reporting Capabilities

  - [Attio provides various chart types: line, bar, pie charts](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Reports can be created on any attribute in the system](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Examples: ARR ranges, deals in stage, average time in status, sales funnels, forecasted revenue](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Reports can be customized (e.g., changing from monthly to weekly view)](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Option to create both shared and private reports](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)

### Data Model and Object Structure

  - [Uses "people" object instead of separate leads and contacts](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Deals exist from the beginning of the funnel, no lead conversion process](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Deal stages can be used to represent the entire sales process (e.g., lead stage to closed-won)](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [People are automatically synced from email interactions](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

### Data Quality and Required Fields

  - [Currently no native "required fields" feature (in development for early 2023)](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Workaround: Use workflows to bounce deals back if certain fields are not filled](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [Workflows can provide immediate feedback via pop-up notifications](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)

### Integrations and Automation

  - [Native integration with High Touch for data warehouse connections](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Extensive Zapier integration available](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [API access for custom integrations](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Typeform integration for capturing website leads](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Email sequence capabilities for follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)

### Lists and Views

  - [Lists are subsets of objects, useful for creating specific views (e.g., VC portfolio companies)](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Can be used when object limits are reached or for one-time events](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Workflows can automatically add people to lists based on criteria](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to create a list of specific reports she wants to build](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Attio team to schedule a proper onboarding session for Bridget and her team](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [Jared to send a Loom video demonstrating workflow usage for deal stage management](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Bridget to explore the Attio Academy for self-paced learning](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Attio team to follow up on setting up an onboarding session with product specialists](https://fathom.video/share/EiyUEtkEay8_F7G1raVsGb9r-zaXxC7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

action_items.description: Create list of reports to build in Attio for next onboarding call
Send Loom video on workflows for deal stage use case
Contact onboarding team to schedule session with Bridget
